refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation, task scheduling, and resource allocation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency, task scheduling, resource allocation) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations; verify that each sub-FR contributes to meeting or exceeding the productivity target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation efficiency to maximize output per unit time.
FR2: Schedule tasks effectively to minimize idle time and maximize utilization.
FR3: Allocate resources dynamically to support continuous productivity.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to improve operation efficiency.
DP2: Intelligent task scheduling system to optimize work sequences.
DP3: Dynamic resource management framework to allocate equipment and personnel.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to improve operation efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires interface coordination with task scheduling and resource management DPs.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be modularized and updated independently.
Risk that tight coupling with scheduling and resource allocation may increase complexity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions and modularization to reduce coupling in next decomposition level.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands from NGHE Solution for execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication channel for remote control and data exchange.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control DP; low diffusion as control logic is centralized.
Contains task scheduling and resource management; partial overlap with vehicle control.
Limited containment; mainly remote control interface.
Minimal containment; focused on safety alerts.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the best architectural boundary for implementing advanced vehicle control algorithms due to high containment and low diffusion scores.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for tasking and resource allocation.
Risk of diffusion if control logic is duplicated across modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and centralize control logic within Vehicle module to mitigate diffusion risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (advanced vehicle control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR of optimizing equipment operation efficiency.

diffusion_risks: Possible duplication of control logic if interfaces are not well managed.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of DP with minimal diffusion, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring vehicle operational metrics and telemetry data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of vehicle control DP to Vehicle module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Plan for integration testing to verify interface correctness and performance.

decision.justification: The current decomposition level is consistent, with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Interfaces and containment are well defined with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation efficiency to maximize output per unit time.
FR2: Schedule tasks effectively to minimize idle time and maximize utilization.
FR3: Allocate resources dynamically to support continuous productivity.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be modularized within Vehicle module.
Interfaces between modules will be clearly defined and managed.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Potential diffusion of control logic if not centralized.
evidence_needed: Performance data from vehicle control algorithms during representative operations.
Interface compliance and integration test results.
